Platform demo · v1 foundation

IFS CommandIQ — running, branded, and seeded

A walkthrough of the CommandIQ platform as it runs today on the local dev stack: white-labeled to the IFS identity, loaded with a realistic Last-Mile / Middle-Mile fleet dataset, and demonstrating the native capabilities the functional spec builds on — asset registry, VIN-keyed work orders, preventive maintenance triggers, and parts inventory.

Platform core
CBRE Fleet v0.7.51
Environment
Development stack (Docker)
Extension
packages/commandiq
Live access
Credentials shared separately
Every screen below is live, not mocked. The console runs against a seeded database on the IFS development stack; interactive access to the running console is available on request.

Console walkthrough

Each screen is live against the seeded database — nothing is mocked. Tags reference the functional-spec requirements each screen demonstrates or lays the base for.

The seeded dataset

Modeled on the spec's operating world: DSP-operated Last-Mile vans returning to Texas delivery stations, and national Middle-Mile trailers touching major hubs.

DomainRecordsDetail
Vehicles86 LM vans (DSPs RRLG / BLZE / SWFT at DAL3, DAU5) + 2 MM trailers, real VIN formats, odometers, live coordinates
Places42 LM delivery stations (Dallas, Austin) + 2 MM hubs (Fort Worth, San Antonio), geocoded
Work orders6One per lifecycle status; corrective, preventive, device-replacement, and 2 campaign retrofits
PM schedules3Distance-based: 5,000 mi (vans), 25,000 mi (trailer)
Parts5Camera kits, GO9 units, conspicuity tape, brake pads, mirror assembly — one below reorder point
Devices4Serialized Netradyne cameras and Geotab GO9 units installed on specific VINs
Warranties2Netradyne device coverage + Ford ESP extended plan, active through 2028

What this demonstrates — and what comes next

The screens above are the platform foundation (spec sections 8.1, 8.4, 8.5, 8.9–8.11). The CommandIQ differentiators are scaffolded as an extension in packages/commandiq and land per the delivery plan.

CapabilityStatusWhere
Asset registry, work orders, PM triggers, parts, warranties, serialized devicesLive todayFleet-Ops (shown above)
IFS white-label brandingLive todayConsole + Admin → Branding
LM/MM availability forecasting (FR-19–22)v1commandiq extension — models & commands scaffolded
Availability-matched scheduling & QC workflow (FR-23, 27–30)v2commandiq extension — endpoints scaffolded
Campaigns, claims, RMA (FR-36–45)v2commandiq extension — schema ready
Relay Garage / REACH / Geotab connectorsGated on data accessIntegration clients scaffolded; awaiting sanctioned credentials (AC-1)
IFS CommandIQ demo · captured 2026-07-10 against the local Docker stack (CBRE Fleet v0.7.51 platform core) · seed scripts and capture automation live in the session scratchpad; extension scaffold in packages/commandiq.
